title: Potato RPG
description: A simple fantasy RPG designed for multiplayer and to function on my cheap laptop.
body:
Potato RPG was made to function on a cheap laptop while also being fun and looking cool!

    set up a kingdom with your friends, roam the world as a lone traveling hero, start a gang of bandits with your accomplices, create quests for fellow players to complete, grow your power from nothing on your own or with the help of your allies!

    Territory is claimable, parties can be created and customized, there are plenty of structures to conquer and make your own and beautiful landscapes to build your dream base!

    there are a variety of origins and classes to choose from, without overwhelming the player or wildly tipping the power scales.
